h37399e9cga7d5g4dbegbc6agf117d2cadb15: Greetings, child. I've met few aside from goblins here.
hd2faaf79g3612g46ccg9eb9gf41a43aae4e8: *You recognise the scourge - this man is a follower of Loviatar, goddess of pain.*
h285164a4g3159g4b04g92cdg189edd1e08ae: Are you also here to assist with the prisoner?
h3c14efc1g7095g4789g9990g3538c2148de0: I talked with the torturers. Amateurs.
h8870a1f8g3b7dg4f3dg9c23g200c3dac79fe: Quite right. I was invited to teach them. I live for pain and its intricacies, you see.
hdef842cag1b3fg4a09g8fa3g695fa18519a7: But alas, they insist on being so primitive.
h695c0ad5g8ebfg438bgb74dg4d899ef647f4: Pain without purpose is a terrible thing, wouldn't you agree?
hd8768aecg9e31g47d1g8510gbcbe368e9599: As Vlaakith says: we cannot know pleasure without pain.
h44940cadgf05eg4d4dg9b34ge4fc6f81a124: Exactly, pain is an intimate thing. It should be delivered with a loving and measured hand.
h92a8e4d5g6a90g4e9ag83fag5c18e55123b9: But trying to discuss such subtleties with these creatures is simply...
h2018cf05g5620g4fb3gae16gd046e2261b80: Forgive me, but that look in your eyes - something terrible has happened to you.
h0b5b5fabg3112g4b71g8e7dgac7025dbd88d: Clever man. How did you know?
h8eb1a0b3g1ecag4f11g8659g11ea1ec4c6a5: Because I see those same eyes when I look in the mirror, dear one.
h8a3ff860g7704g4ae1ga5ddg6cb62579f260: We've all suffered in these dark times. It is little wonder you bear scars of pain and anguish.
h89d33ca1gd5b7g4d62gb4e9g76a72df4dd0e: Please let me alleviate this pain.
hc2fba9cfga14eg49dfg9b04g13f875c66b59: And how would you do that?
h612bd873g0a37g40bdg828bge43951f82a04: As the Maiden of Pain, the goddess Loviatar, teaches us...
h8d31baf7g6760g4728gac61g59e8d2ea6722: ... through penance - administered by my skilled hand.
h84d61943g007cg4eecgb7c2gab9f54769432: My work can grant peace and serenity - the likes of which few experience. It will be worth it - I promise.
h5c991e62ge130g484dg804agdebc1d2ec8c5: By all means - let us see what his 'skilled hand' might get up to.
hec7dfdf4gf151g4c4agb653gc7a3455a7c80: Oh, I have something exquisite in mind.
h0630c33egfb21g4510g9a1bg3fa1e69042e9: Both Loviatar and I are interested in how you handle pain, dear one.
h8d7f0814g8027g4cf8gaad5ga0f3e9974b46: And should you delight her, you will most assuredly receive her gracious blessing - trust me.
h1271e2f0gfc50g4ad5gb185gd7427ed779d5: Simply face the wall, and we can begin.
hb3b2b4aag46c0g4827g9a08gffd5c7cff9b6: But wait - you are hurt. Please tend to your wounds before we begin your penance.
ha30e7c80g6653g40f5gbf78g8a914e3efeb2: Touch me and you'll lose your hand.
h44191340g4868g4901gabeagc3cc6532ca74: A pity though. You would know such sweet relief at my hands.
hc0b10b72gf0d4g44feg9e0eg97c18087442f: Now, if you'll excuse me, I should return to my own worship.
he66d9a4dgf142g4a03g87efg42e2ce2daf4b: I thought you would prove interesting... I guess I was mistaken.
hb895290ageab1g4ed2g9e6bgd00fd3856528: Go ahead - I'm sure you're in need of a little penance...
h7d8ccd9fgbc1bg4f2bg879egff2869c0b1f4: |Fuck that. This guy gives me the creeps.|
hba7eff73gf4fdg405fg8824g8032cc2f8dd2: I must see this. Don't you dare say no.
hef15deeeg0ab2g44a0g9373ga0a9c46b9ad9: |If this is how you get your kicks, no judgement.|
ha3725302gf6b5g483ag96cdgb613009bf6ed: I wouldn't let his 'skilled hand' anywhere near me.
h26c036c0gd0deg4444gaf1ag69c08ddf16f0: Your hide, your choice. Not quite my cup of tea though.
h3f5f181egc556g49c6gad72g14dcea25b43f: I know of your penance - my companion has tried it.
h9f559b87g212dg4ab4g9f16g164d130c4e38: Well, perhaps you'd be interested in finishing what they started?
h68f6302bgefbdg4e6fgb0a4gf6f28df66329: Well - the Maiden of Pain, Loviatar, teaches us that pain is a most powerful and sacred sensation.
h5e380fbeg9b06g4f1cga48dg09bd8fba7cdd: And should our pain delight her - should we embrace such a gift - she will grant her most sacred of blessings.
h60863a9bg413fg435fg88ccgc397c04ccbd5: If you would permit it, I can show you firsthand.
hb254f8f2g04e5g4d4fg92beg138ae1c0ca75: Oh, I have something exquisite in mind.
h70b9ab5dg633eg4e3dgb017g9f9747a7667a: A pity. You would know such sweet relief at my hands.
hc7ff5c53g5d93g4623gaccfgadc67fc43d12: Should you realise you need my assistance, come back. I'll be waiting.
hb71cb3b4g5003g4be3g81e5gc3333a659f2b: Do not be ashamed, child. What I see in your eyes, in your soul, is only natural.
h2e3d2746ga57dg4c2dg90e4g311a6660457c: Yes. He's just over there. Between you and I, his claims of mastery over pain are unfounded.
he1914401g1f5eg42a9g97fag838f19066104: Pain should be intimate and loving - not violent and brutish. Alas, he...
h962570a8g6519g4692gb535gb79d3e61fba2: Or claimed, rather. Pain should be intimate and loving - not violent and brutish. Perhaps in death he...
h6d2bff95gfb66g4393gbb10gc63eb9ec1738: Yes. One who claims to be a master of pain. Tch.
h1ec44e34ga026g4653ga300g07d678249056: Pain is intimate and loving. But trying to discuss that with these creatures...
h7a41cef0g0110g479dga2a7g32179ab98a8f: Then why are you beating yourself?
h1a0d7b75gd1d5g4621g90b9g6e1848958e2b: Hah. I realise this looks strange, but I assure you, it is a most intimate form of worship.
h41887f32g7a4ag49f0gb12bg43a6221ec001: You see, pain is a loving thing. But trying to explain it to these goblins has proven...
hc9fbafebgccd8g4cbeg9030g610ab8a46393: I thought a follower of Loviatar would approve of pain.
h9df654bdgce3cg4df8gb31agc09c5db4b05e: You know the Maiden of Pain? How refreshing. But there is more to us than that.
h5be3ae7bg206cg4388g957dgf56ed5d194f2: Yes, we worship her through pain - often our own. But it is an intimate and loving thing and one we offer up.
h1048a0e1g3cdcg42f6g8642gf71d1de4d77d: If you would permit it, I can show you firsthand.
h924c0818g87e9g470fga09agf616d03c31f1: What's a follower of the Maiden of Pain doing here?
he965700dg16deg4367g847fgdfd865b6569e: Ah, you are familiar with the Scourge Mistress? Good. I am simply spreading her message, friend.
h4ed6f873g10b3g4333g8b53g43ce6537802b: I worship her through pain - usually my own. But I have a skilled hand when it comes to its infliction.
h85f4ef2dgf886g401dgbe6fge9cdd26dc478: Care to expand your horizons? It will be worth it - you have my word.
hd4f3f974g306ag46b7g85f3gad6fa850d239: I saw your book. Let me try some of those techniques.
h87c55079g4f7dg40cfg8cf4g58f1292bb359: My - an eager student indeed. Those are advanced devotions.
h3cbe9b12gba73g422egbb45g79e153d66c58: The Mistress would approve. Indicate which instrument calls to you, and let us put it to work.
h08a69842g6022g4b86g8938g28d40e1b89fe: Oh, I do believe we are both going to enjoy this.
h03f98e55g682ag49ddg8dbagdbd5cf3c3a70: I'm not in a gentle mood. Use the dagger.
hfb231b02g1031g4596gb277g09031a496af6: Take the handaxe and show me your worst.
h7e9e2d2ag3dfeg4ee2gaa1ega3a657e3c3da: I've no interest in the teachings of such an evil goddess.
h03bd40acg1572g450ag8a5dg6421395c5ef1: Pain is pain, dear one. It is above 'good' and 'evil'.
h7e23daf8g2255g4658gb2d9gec8d7cbc9f69: But very well. You are clearly too closed-minded for the ways of Loviatar.
h24b79e89g26d8g4914ga384gce56c36e3611: No - Shar has already claimed me.
h8b3a117eg4781g46a3gb68aga9f8ef481dc3: A shame - the Mistress of the Night and the Maiden of Pain could have such fun together.
hb454eaafgb07eg4730g865dg1786d8166db6: No - I already belong to another.
h179139c3gdb37g4e1fga17fg99c384050d4d: Unfortunate. Loviatar is always happy to share her pleasures.
h48c311ffgd023g4529ga5efgbb38d8f42100: You know the value of suffering. Prepare for the coming pain.
he4c69bc4g4d08g4495g9703g77d34099d1b8: My god is a possessive one - I better refrain.
h8668dac9gadbeg49c7g8789ged85d3e08892: You mean the one they are torturing?
hca7007ebg8976g4196g8923ge00644e4cbaa: Please. The things they are doing to that man... so crude and primitive.
he3b6f6c7g0020g4d9ag8b90ga9616b7943dc: I was invited to to teach them. I live for pain and its intricacies, you see, but alas...
hb10166e7gcf86g4af1gaab2g59419bca359a: I was invited to teach them some of my... techniques. I live for pain and its intricacies, you see.
h411ac4ccg1a3eg44ddga019g31948defb09a: But alas, these goblins seem to thrive on the crude and primitive.
h6f415fb1gb30fg4a0bg93a9g10ccbc7976f0: Your tastes must turn to the exotic, if you would stop here by choice.
h8fe64fceg6e39g4e4cg98c6g709f7b97b55c: I was invited to discuss pain and its intricacies, but even I find these goblins crude and, well - primitive.
h10bc4d28ga851g44e8g9c58g2f309f3c6aa8: The gentleman being held next door. My acquaintance is working on him, I believe.
hd52e5401g035ag4819gbbfcg93394799e489: While I was thrilled to be invited here, I must confess I find the goblins and their methods... crude and primitive.
hb2f6cdbeg5743g437bgb03fgd4c81523e1cc: Greetings, child. I fear your companion could not fully embrace my penance.
h3f6d6693g5b6cg42b7g8516g63bc305b9e91: But I understand. Pain is something that requires commitment, wouldn't you say?
h61768266ga3b5g4bd5ga94dge32d8916acab: Most excellent! Then I shall speak plainly.
h8bf8cebag80f4g4ccfg8810gaa33f9da9741: Would you care experience it firsthand? To know peace and serenity, the likes of which few experience?
hebe7d92egd16fg4848g85efgfe44e0945b9f: Exactly. And should your friend lack such qualities, that is not their fault.
hffb59e4agc4a4g467fgbd82g7e77a95c5322: I pity them. They've missed out on the true intimacies of pain...
hdeee869agb692g409egab60g496f8be3045f: True. But isn't that why it's important to try it? To expand your horizons?
h636eb64dg2d9dg4246g815bg8cb77805389a: To understand pain and its intimacies...
h1292804bg5044g43a4g8a18geb38b11ac2f3: Dear child, I told you - take care of those wounds, and we will begin your penance.
hc3607b99g14fdg4cc5g89f0g6eaf558e6340: I see you are whole once again. Tell me, child - would you care to begin?
h447383beg061eg4f3dg84cbg3412d19697ac: You have refused the gift of penance, dear one. I will waste no more time asking you.
h401cf17fg7375g40bbg8ee9ge366ab428c69: Dear child, tell me: would you like to continue your worship of Loviatar, Maiden of Pain?
hf9ac914dg1f5dg4116g8fa0g3d312c72411a: I think I can do without.
h6759f6f6g31cfg40d6gb5e0g72b8c6a494e7: Pity. You do not understand the gift you refuse.
h003ead4bg3c09g4a40g865cg49585db41ebf: Well met, dear child. Would you enjoy some hands-on worship of Loviatar, Maiden of Pain?
h28a9b9e6ga553g4f9ega36eg462179e0faf5: I saw your book. I'd like to try some of those techniques.
heb44171ag92b2g42e1ga818gd63a2b132cd9: I think I can do without.
h644d7d82gd8bag458egaf72g84c09aa3a6c5: Pity. You do not understand the gift you refuse.
